name: ableton-live-mcp
description: Control Ableton Live from Claude: build tracks, edit MIDI, load devices, mix, and master.
long_description: 104 tools for driving a running Ableton Live set: session and transport, tracks and mixer, clips and MIDI, devices and automation, the browser, the arrangement, and built-in generators. Requires a one-time Remote Script install into Ableton (run `abletonmcp install`).

toolsets.title: Toolsets
toolsets.description: Comma-separated tool groups to load, or 'all'. Groups: session, tracks, clips, devices, browser, arrangement, generators.
